summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AM Scheduling feature (admin-scheduled AM tasks with per-shift recurrence). All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend pages load and role-based access control is functioning. AM Compliance KPI integrated into Analytics page.
passed_tests: BACKEND 1.1: GET /api/am-schedules lists Fryer schedule with shifts A,B,C and active status
BACKEND 1.2: POST /api/am-schedules with duplicate template correctly returns 400
BACKEND 1.3: POST /api/am-schedules with empty shifts correctly returns 400
BACKEND 1.4: POST /api/am-schedules as tech user correctly returns 403
BACKEND 1.5: PUT /api/am-schedules updates shifts from A,B,C to A,B and restores back to A,B,C
BACKEND 1.6: PUT /api/am-schedules deactivate/reactivate deletes and regenerates today's PENDING instances
BACKEND 2: POST /api/am-schedules/line-wide creates schedules for all machines with AM templates on a line
BACKEND 3: GET /api/am-tasks returns last-7-days instances with correct filters (status, machine_id) and is idempotent
BACKEND 4: POST /api/public/am-submissions links submission to task, updates status to SUBMITTED, and updates AM compliance KPI to 100%
BACKEND 5: GET /api/analytics/kpis returns AM compliance at plant/line levels, null for lines without AM, and 0 for past date ranges
FRONTEND 1: AM Checklists page loads for admin with Scheduled AM Tasks panel and Recurring Schedules panel
FRONTEND 1: Schedule AM Tasks and New AM Template buttons visible for admin
FRONTEND 2: AM Checklists page accessible to tech user
FRONTEND 2: Schedule AM Tasks and New AM Template buttons correctly hidden from tech user
FRONTEND 3: Analytics page loads with AM Compliance KPI card visible
FRONTEND 5: Public AM kiosk page loads
